title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
